mapper.insert: INSERT INTO company_disabled_employee(company_id, name, id_card, disability_cert_no, disability_type, disability_level, job_position, entry_date, is_active, audit_pass_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES(#{companyId}, #{name}, #{idCard}, #{disabilityCertNo}, #{disabilityType}, #{disabilityLevel}, #{jobPosition}, #{entryDate}, #{isActive}, #{auditPassTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM company_disabled_employee WHERE company_id = #{companyId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM company_disabled_employee WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND is_active = #{isActive} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM company_disabled_employee WHERE id_card = #{idCard} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM company_disabled_employee WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND is_active = 1
